name: SetBank
doc:
SUB FASTCALL SetBank(bankNumber AS UByte)

Place the specified bank at $c000 and update system variable BANKM. Only for 128K+ models.

name: GetBank
doc:
FUNCTION FASTCALL GetBank() AS UByte

Return the bank number currently placed at $c000.

name: SetCodeBank
doc:
SUB SetCodeBank(bankNumber AS UByte)

Place a bank at $8000-$bfff copying code/data as needed and restore previous bank.
